nasb.text: Now Abraham journeyed from there toward the land of the Negev, and settled between Kadesh and Shur; then he sojourned in Gerar.

esv.text: From there Abraham journeyed toward the territory of the Negeb and lived between Kadesh and Shur; and he sojourned in Gerar.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕從那裡遷到南地，就住在加低斯和書珥中間。亞伯拉罕寄居在基拉耳的時候，

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕从幔利迁往南地，住在加低斯和书珥之间。在基拉耳寄居期间，

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕从那里起程去南地，住在加低斯和书珥之间。后来他寄居在基拉耳。
